body:
Objective: Find why Facebook Live video no longer loads on the Maad 97.5 FM site.

Context: Next.js 13 app. Facebook video component is `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx`. It integrates Facebook Live video embed. User reports video stopped loading.

Action Steps:
1. Read `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx` fully.
2. Grep for where GetLiveVideo is imported/used (layout, pages).
3. Check for Facebook SDK script loading, iframe/embed URL construction, any hardcoded page IDs or access tokens.
4. Look for recent git log changes touching GetLiveVideo.tsx or related files: `git log --oneline -20 -- src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx` and `git log --oneline -20`.
5. Check if Facebook embed URL/SDK URL is still valid format. Note any deprecated patterns (e.g. old FB plugin URLs, missing SDK init).
6. Report file:line references for the embed mechanism and any suspicious code.

Deliverables: Root cause hypothesis with file:line refs. Note the exact Facebook embed mechanism used (iframe vs SDK vs plugin), the page ID/channel referenced, and what likely broke (URL format, deprecated API, missing SDK, CSP, etc.). Do NOT fix anything — read-only investigation.

Prerequisites: `src/app/components/GetLiveVideo.tsx`, `src/app/layout.tsx`, and any importer files.
